Name: Cost MCP Role-Assignment Grantor (custom, Phase 6.2 deploy)
Description: Grants ONLY the ability to create/read the single Cost Management Reader role assignment for id-cost-mcp-server at subscription scope. Constrained via an ABAC condition on the role assignment (not this definition) to that one target role definition (72fafb9e-0641-4937-9268-a91bfd8191a3) — this is not a general Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments delegation grant. Exists because main.bicep's costMcpRoleAssignment resource is the one deliberately subscription-scoped role assignment in the project, and the deploy app's existing Role Based Access Control Administrator grant is scoped only to rg-contextforge-dev, not the subscription.
